case_title: TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES VS. GABIA PAKSTYS ET AL

docket_entries.description: EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF PERSONAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT PAKSTYS, GABIA
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE IS $97.80 FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES
DECLARATION RE: LOST ORIGINAL RENTAL AGREEMENT, THREE DAY NOTICE AND PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO V, INCLUSIVE

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PAKSTYS, GABIA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 2000 BROADWAY STREET APARTMENT #215, CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94115, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES AS TO DEFENDANT PAKSTYS, GABIA DOES 1 TO V, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
